title: Humberto Cubillos-Uejbe
compiled_truth: Humberto Cubillos-Uejbe is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-10-12), Humberto Cubillos-Uejbe sent 2 and received 35 emails, totalling 37 interactions. Top correspondents: [Matthew Gockerman](people/matthew-gockerman) (1), [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (1), [Sarah Wesner](people/sarah-wesner) (1), [Catherine Clark](people/catherine-clark) (1), [Andy Zipper](people/andy-zipper) (1).
